cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.14)
project(SuperRecomp VERSION 1.0)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# --- 1. THE GENERATOR TOOL ---
# This builds the 'compiler' that reads the ROM and spits out C++ code.
set(TOOL_SOURCES
    src/tool.cpp
)

add_executable(RecompTool ${TOOL_SOURCES})

# --- 2. THE RECOMPILED GAME ---
# This builds the actual recompiled game using the files we created.
# Note: recompiled_rom.cpp is generated by running RecompTool.
set_source_files_properties(src/recompiled_rom.cpp PROPERTIES GENERATED TRUE)

set(GAME_SOURCES
    src/main.cpp
    src/snes_cpu.cpp
    src/recompiled_rom.cpp
)

add_executable(SuperRecompGame ${GAME_SOURCES})

# --- INCLUDE DIRECTORIES ---
target_include_directories(RecompTool PUBLIC ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
target_include_directories(SuperRecompGame PUBLIC ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
